description.short: Read, search, post, schedule, and manage Slack from Copilot Cowork.
description.full: Brings Slack into Copilot Cowork with read and write skills: summarize channels, search and cite messages, recap threads, look up people, post and bulk-broadcast updates, react, share files, set status/DND, edit and schedule messages, pin to channels, create Slack reminders, and manage channels (create, invite, topic/purpose, rename, archive). Backed by an in-tenant MCP server hosted in your Azure subscription — no vendor-hosted MCP in the path. All write actions surface a confirmation prompt via MCP annotations.

agentConnectors.description: Read and post to Slack channels, search messages, recap threads, and manage workspace items. Backed by an in-tenant MCP server.
